title: Vultures spread their wings high
description: GEORGE NEWS - With few fixtures remaining in...
bodyText:
GEORGE NEWS - With few fixtures remaining in the league, Vultures spread their wings high when they sank Southern Academy 2-1 in a tough Promotional/Development League on Saturday afternoon, 7 September at the Lawaaikamp Stadium.


> Inathi Mabele and Hlumelo Stwayi converted the two goals for the the high-flying team, while Yanga Mtshonyana netted the solitary goal for the Academy team.


Khanyani Nobhakada, George Vultures' shot-stopper, delivered a stellar performance in their game against Academy, standing in their way and blocking their clear-cut chances during the game.

With 56 points, the Vultures are aiming at the second position fighting their way up to reach the promotional spot. They have played 25 fixtures with 17 victories, 5 draws and 3 defeats.

Meanwhile, Southern Academy is currently battling for the top eight positions with 35 points in their bag.

PROMOTIONAL LEAGUE WEEKEND RESULTS:

• Tigers 0-3 Raul Stars

• George Celtics 5-1 France United

• Vista vs George Celtics (Vista didn't honour their fixture)

• Southern Academy 3-2 Vuvuzela

• George Vultures 2-1 Southern Academy

• Spurs United 5-2 Young Masters

• Tigers vs George Vultures (Tigers didn't honour their fixture)

• Celtics 4-2 Paris United

• Vista 1-8 Future Stars

‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’
